content: Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement pipeline can be grounded by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break through the "feedback blind spots of single-perspective self-feedback. This creates a zero-training, zero-supervised-data self-refinement framework that not only retains Self-Refine's low resource requirement while correcting the common bias where LLMs fail to recognize their own errors in single-perspective feedback.
